incorrects.description: Student selected 2, counting bars instead of reading the scale
Student selected 2, confusing the number of bars or marks with the value

params.description: Yellow bar remains highlighted with axis gridlines emphasized.
Yellow bar remains highlighted. Axis marks 10 and 20 pulse to draw attention to the scale.

steps.text: That's how many jumps of 10. But each jump is worth 10. Look at the axis numbers. Where does the bar end?
You counted something, but not the value. Look at where the bar ends on the axis. The numbers on the side show the scale.

incorrects.description: Student selected 12, misreading the scale or adding incorrectly
Student selected 12, possibly adding 10 and 2 or misreading the scale

params.text: Count by 10s from 0. First line is 10, next line is 20. Which line does Yellow's bar reach?
The scale goes by 10s, not 1s. Count by 10s: 10, 20. Where does the Yellow bar end?

steps.description: Student selected 25, reading between lines when bar is at a line
Student selected 25, possibly estimating halfway between 20 and 30

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from top of Yellow bar to axis at 20.
Yellow bar remains highlighted. The 20 axis mark glows.

params.text: The bar ends exactly at a line, not between lines. This line shows 20. Count by 10s: 10, then 20.
Look closely at where the bar ends. It's right at the 20 line, not between lines. Count by 10s to check.

steps.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Axis values 10, 20 glow in sequence, then guideline draws from Yellow bar to 20.
Axis marks 10, 20 pulse sequentially as counting animation plays for Yellow bar.

steps.text: Let me show you. Start at 0. Count by 10s: 10, 20. Yellow's bar ends right at the 20 line. That's the value. The answer is 20 because the bar's height matches the 20 on the axis.
Let me show you. I count by 10s up the axis: 10, 20. The Yellow bar ends right at the 20 line. The bar shows 20, not any other number. That's how the scale works.
